markdownRemark.html:
It being summer, I've been running about with the incredible new Etymotic ER4XR hooked up to my iPhone 6s instead of my usual dedicated music player since pocket space is limited without a bulky winter coat. These amazing little IEMs are an updated version of the historic ER4S which, if you are really interested, you can read about on this Head-Fi thread.

RY X - Dawn

My Morning Jacket - It Still Moves

Fantastic Negrito - The Last Days of Oakland

Desert Island Discs - Music you gotta have

Yann Tiersen & Shannon Wright - self titled
